{{Infobox madra
| name = blood madra
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[blood madra Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Blood [[madra]] is one of the seven primary [[aspects of madra]], alongside fire, earth, [[wind]], [[water]], force, and life. It is characterized by its direct influence on living organisms, possessing the ability to manipulate, strengthen, or destroy flesh. When used for healing, it can remove damaged tissue and accelerate the knitting of muscle and bone, though it is often paired with [[life madra]] to smooth out the healing process. Conversely, [[blood]] [[madra]] can be highly destructive; it is capable of tearing apart bodies, burning flesh like tinder when combined with fire, and even causing internal organs to rebel against a host. It is also noted for its ability to strengthen muscles in certain body types. In terms of composition and behavior, [[blood]] [[madra]] can exist as a liquid-like essence or be blended with other [[aspects]]. For example, the [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] is composed of [[blood]] and [[hunger madra]], with other [[aspects]] held in separate spheres that give it the appearance of bleeding. It can also be found in specialized forms, such as [[Bloodspawn{{!}}bloodspawn]]—entities that arise from spilled [[blood]] and act as red puppets or parodies of humans. While it is a potent tool for combat and physical enhancement, its presence can be conspicuous, potentially drawing unwanted attention due to its distinct nature. Some practitioners may also utilize specialized [[elixirs]] designed specifically to restore [[blood and sword madra]].}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Remnant]] flickers with [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[blood madra{{!}}Blood madra]] is a type of [[madra]] that supposedly holds sinister powers over living bodies.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] once hauled on a rope of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bloodspawn{{!}}bloodspawn]] are made of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[blood madra{{!}}Blood madra]] removes unhealthy tissue and grows more.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[blood madra{{!}}Blood madra]] can break down skin and control the body by tearing it apart.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The young woman's [[blood madra]] trickled from her feet across the sand.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[blood madra{{!}}Blood madra]] affects living bodies directly.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider's Remnant]] is made mostly of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] uses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The color of [[blood madra]] is red.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] is composed of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s techniques will require refining due to the introduction of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[blood madra{{!}}Blood madra]] disproportionately affects flesh.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Bloodspawn]] are constructed from [[blood madra]] and the will of [[The Phoenix{{!}}the Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[blood madra{{!}}Blood madra]] is harder to use for cutting if there is no [[blood]] present.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[spirit]] was [[Forged]] of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[blood madra{{!}}Blood madra]] can flow up a spear.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a [[Netherworld]] of flashing [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] helps manage the [[blood madra]] inside [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] and [[Lindon]] were studying [[blood madra]] to complete her new [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]]'s [[Striker technique]] used [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The red-winged human avatar of the [[Dreadgod]] was formed from [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] can pull javelins of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[blood madra]] is used for strengthening muscles in Overlord bodies.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
